---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the pain point or limitation.

## Proposed Solution

What should the feature do? Be specific about the behavior and interface.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches have you considered and why aren't they sufficient?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Additional Context

Any references, mockups, or examples from other projects.
